positive: A symmetrical and geometrically balanced celestial forest scene. The main subject features stylized, oversized bioluminescent flora and fauna, integrated with constellations and nebula patterns. Use a neo-traditional illustration style combined with graphic art deco elements. The composition must emphasize strong silhouettes and dramatic contrast. Color palette should be deep sapphire blues, luminous emerald greens, and electric violet accents, contrasted against a matte black background. The light source should be ethereal and contained within the glowing plants, casting clean, sharp highlights. Highly detailed, vector-art quality, ready for screen printing on apparel. Mid-shot, central composition, mystical, magical, clean lines, engraved etching style.
negative: low detail, grainy, watermark, text, signature, logo, blurry, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, artifacts, tiling, repetition, ugly, washed out, monochrome
